raw_title: Network Histories: Methods and Measures for Studying Interdependence and Interconnectedness Within Digital Journalism
title_en: Network Histories: Methods and Measures for Studying Interdependence and Interconnectedness Within Digital Journalism
title_zh: 网络历史：研究数字新闻业内部相互依赖与互联性的方法与测量
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨如何研究数字新闻业中不同部分如何相互连接和依赖。它关注使用网络历史方法来理解新闻机构、技术和人员之间的关系。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how to study how different parts of digital journalism connect and depend on each other. It focuses on using network history methods to understand relationships between news organizations, technologies, and people.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻研究中的网络分析方法论，特别关注历史视角下的媒体网络演变和结构研究。
research_direction_en: Network analysis methodology in digital journalism research, with particular focus on historical perspectives on media network evolution and structure.
